case_title: FLENOURY LAMARR B VS MELLOD SCOTT MICHEAL et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AERO SPECIAL DELIVERY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY FLENOURY LAMARR B AS TO DEFENDANT MELLOD SCOTT MICHEAL AERO SPECIAL DELIVERY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
